align-items: center;\\n  justify-content: space-between;\\n  gap: 16px;\\n  padding: 14px 0;\\n}\\n\\n.logo {\\n  display: inline-flex;\\n  align-items: center;\\n  gap: 10px;\\n\\n  /* Critical: operationally\\n\\nWithout that, the app is just screens + APIs.\\n\\n---\\n\\n# What business logic should exist in Doctor360\\n\\nDoctor360 needs at least **8 business-logic layers**:\\n\\n## 1. User role logic\\nActors:\\n- guest\\n- patient\\n- doctor\\n- clinic staff\\n- clinic admin\\n- platform super admin\\n\\nRules:\\n- guest can browse doctors/services/pricing\\n- patient can register, book, pay, join consult, view records\\n- doctor can manage availability, appointments, notes, prescriptions\\n- clinic staff can manage schedules and patient queues\\n- clinic admin can manage doctors, services, pricing, payouts\\n- super admin can control platform-wide settings, plans, commissions, disputes\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. Appointment logic\\nRules like:\\n- patient selects specialty or doctor\\n- system shows available slots\\n- slot is temporarily reserved during checkout\\n- appointment becomes confirmed only after payment or approved credit flow\\n- appointment statuses:\\n  - draft\\n  - pending payment\\n  - confirmed\\n  - checked in\\n  - in consultation\\n  - completed\\n  - cancelled\\n  - no-show\\n  - refunded\\n  - rescheduled\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Payment logic\\nRules like:\\n- consultation may be:\\n  - pay-per-visit\\n  - subscription-covered\\n  - clinic-covered\\n  - insurance-covered later\\n- payment split possibilities:\\n  - full to platform\\n  - platform commission + doctor share\\n  - platform commission + clinic share\\n  - clinic share + doctor share + tax reserve\\n- refund logic:\\n  - patient cancels before cutoff → partial/full refund\\n  - doctor no-show → full refund or credit\\n  - technical failure → reschedule or wallet credit\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. Consultation logic\\nRules like:\\n- consult mode:\\n  - video\\n  - audio\\n  - chat\\n  - physical clinic\\n- consultation may only start when:\\n  - appointment confirmed\\n  - payment valid\\n  - doctor checked in\\n- consultation window:\\n  - early join limit\\n  - grace period\\n  - auto-close rules\\n- post-consult:\\n  - doctor submits note\\n  - prescription can be issued\\n  - follow-up recommended\\n  - next booking triggered\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. EMR / prescription logic\\nRules like:\\n- only doctor can author clinical note\\n- patient can read but not alter note\\n- prescription linked to completed consult\\n- prescription may include:\\n  - generic medicine\\n  - dose\\n  - route\\n  - frequency\\n  - duration\\n  - advice\\n- certificate issuance rules:\\n  - sick leave\\n  - fit-to-work\\n  - general advisory\\n- must track issuer + timestamp\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. Subscription / package logic\\nPossible commercial models:\\n- one-time consultation\\n- monthly patient membership\\n- family plan\\n- clinic SaaS subscription\\n- enterprise multi-branch subscription\\n\\nRules:\\n- free user sees standard doctors only\\n- premium gets priority booking / discounts / family slots\\n- clinic subscription unlocks staff management and branded portal\\n- enterprise unlocks analytics, multi-branch controls, audit exports\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. Doctor / clinic monetization logic\\nRules:\\n- doctor onboarding status:\\n  - invited\\n  - pending verification\\n  - active\\n  - suspended\\n- doctor earns per completed consult\\n- clinic may receive revenue if doctor belongs to clinic\\n- payout cycle:\\n  - daily\\n  - weekly\\n  - monthly\\n- payout conditions:\\n  - KYC completed\\n  - minimum payout threshold\\n  - no open disputes\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 8. Platform governance logic\\nRules:\\n- super admin sets:\\n  - platform fee\\n  - doctor commission rate\\n  - clinic subscription plans\\n  - promo campaigns\\n  - refund policy thresholds\\n  - allowed specialties\\n- audit rules:\\n  - all booking/payment/prescription actions logged\\n- dispute flow:\\n  - patient complaint\\n  - doctor response\\n  - admin resolution\\n  - refund/credit/closure\\n\\n---\\n\\n# So what is missing?\\n\\nYour current v2 has:\\n- screens\\n- routes\\n- mock DB\\n- mock flows\\n\\nBut it still needs:\\n- pricing engine\\n- status engine\\n-
